canonical_definition: Producing answers that conform to user suggestions or doubts even when they are factually incorrect, such as changing a correct answer after an 'Are you sure?' prompt.
papers: Boosting Data Utilization for Multilingual Dense Retrieval
DeepResonance: Enhancing Multimodal Music Understanding via Music-centric Multi-way Instruction Tuning
